summary: Apple Intelligence powers chat and storage analysis on supported Macs, with layered local AI fallbacks.
introduced: Layered AI provider architecture: Apple Foundation Models, MLX, Ollama developer mode, and rule-based fallback
Ask DiskWise chat with autocomplete and dynamic suggested questions when Apple Intelligence is available
AI executive summary in Storage Intelligence after each scan
AI assistant settings for provider preference and Ollama developer mode
changed: DMG installer windows always show the Finder status bar when opened
Saved scan prompt after startup when cached scan data is available
fixed: DMG status bar configuration no longer fails during release packaging
